calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-06-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jonathan Barkocy, company representative for Plaintiff/Respondent AAA Flag and Banner
Ronald Losch, Esq. for Defendant/Appellant Arthur Prutkov, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Jonathan Barkocy testifies on behalf of plaintiff/respondent and identifies Exhibit 1 as a compilation of correspondence and agreements with the defendant/appellant.

Ronald Losch, Esq. submits a trial brief on behalf of defendant/appellant. Arthur Prutkov testifies on his own behalf.

Matter is taken under submission. Documentary evidence is returned.

Judge Pro Tem Elliott A. Myles, Clerk Marilyn Flores, NOT REPORTED

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Oct-25-2007 Continued To Dec-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
